hits.comment_text: This seems like a solved problem. Any RAG interface I design has links to the original source and passage. Even NotebookLM does this.

hits.comment_text: NotebookLM shows that notebook-style AI is viable for knowledge management, but I still want something closer to version control for LLM notebooks than a wiki.
hits.story_title: LLM Wiki – example of an idea file
